description: Standard mortgage within conforming loan limits. Fixed or adjustable rate.
key_features: Lowest rates with strong credit, PMI removable at 80% LTV, 15/20/30 year terms
best_for: Buyers with good credit and stable income

description: Loan amounts above conforming limits for premium properties.
key_features: Higher loan amounts, competitive rates, requires reserves
best_for: High-value purchases in Portland's premium neighborhoods

description: Government-backed with flexible credit and low down payment.
key_features: Lower credit requirements, seller can contribute 6% to closing costs, MIP required
best_for: First-time buyers with limited savings or lower credit

description: Zero down for military veterans and active duty.
key_features: Zero down, no PMI, funding fee (waived for disabled vets), competitive rates
best_for: Active military / veterans / eligible surviving spouses

description: Zero down for rural and suburban properties.
key_features: Zero down, income limits apply, geographic restrictions, low MI
best_for: Buyers in eligible rural/suburban areas of Oregon and Washington

description: Oregon-specific VA loan program with unique benefits.
key_features: State-level VA program with potentially different terms than federal VA
best_for: Oregon veterans

description: Qualify using 12-24 months of bank statements instead of tax returns.
key_features: No tax returns needed, great for self-employed with write-offs, 12 or 24 month options
best_for: Self-employed borrowers whose tax returns understate income

description: Qualify based on rental property income — not personal income.
key_features: Qualify on rent vs mortgage payment ratio, no personal income docs needed, LLCs allowed
best_for: Real estate investors building rental portfolios

description: Loans that don't require traditional income documentation.
key_features: Asset-based or stated income, higher rates, requires strong reserves
best_for: High net worth borrowers with non-traditional income

description: For borrowers with Individual Taxpayer ID Numbers instead of SSNs.
key_features: Accept ITIN instead of SSN, alternative credit accepted, specific lender programs
best_for: Non-citizen borrowers with ITIN numbers

description: Special programs for medical professionals with student debt.
key_features: Student loan flexibility, higher DTI allowed, may waive PMI, tailored for medical professionals
best_for: Physicians / dentists / medical professionals with high student debt

description: Qualify using liquid assets divided over loan term as income.
key_features: Use assets as income, no employment required, ideal for retirees or high-asset borrowers
best_for: Retirees or high-net-worth individuals without traditional employment income

description: Jumbo loan with only 5% down — rare product.
key_features: High loan amounts with low down payment, limited availability, strong credit required
best_for: Buyers who need jumbo but want to preserve cash

description: Finance new construction or major renovations in one loan.
key_features: Single close or two-close options, fund construction draws, FHA 203k and conventional reno
best_for: Buyers building new or doing major renovation

description: Short-term financing to bridge gap between buying and selling.
key_features: 6-12 month terms, allows buying before selling current home, interest-only payments
best_for: Buyers who need to purchase before their current home sells

description: Financing for manufactured and modular homes on land.
key_features: FHA / VA / conventional options for manufactured homes on permanent foundation, chattel options for homes in parks
best_for: Manufactured home buyers (on land or in parks)
available_through: In-house + Wholesale (CMG / HomeBridge / Credit Human / Triad)

description: Financing for vacant land purchases.
key_features: Raw land or improved lots, shorter terms typical, limited lender options
best_for: Buyers purchasing land for future construction

description: Access home equity without monthly payments for 62+ homeowners.
key_features: No monthly payments, multiple payout options, HUD counseling required, non-recourse
best_for: Homeowners 62+ who want to access equity

description: Replace mortgage with larger one and take difference as cash.
key_features: Access up to 80% LTV, lower rates than consumer credit, tax-deductible interest for home improvements
best_for: Homeowners who want to access equity for renovations / debt consolidation / investment

description: Revolving credit line secured by home equity.
key_features: Interest-only during draw period, variable rate (some fixed options), draw as needed
best_for: Homeowners who want flexible ongoing access to equity

description: HELOC without touching existing first mortgage.
key_features: Keep your existing low first mortgage rate, second lien position, flexible access
best_for: Homeowners with a great first mortgage rate who don't want to refinance

description: Fixed-rate second lien for lump sum equity access.
key_features: Fixed rate and payment, doesn't disturb first mortgage, lump sum disbursement
best_for: Homeowners who want a fixed amount at a fixed rate without refinancing

description: State and lender-specific programs to help with down payment and closing costs.
key_features: Grants or forgivable loans for down payment, income limits may apply, first-time buyer programs
best_for: First-time buyers who need help with upfront costs
available_through: Wholesale (EPM / Open Mortgage / PRMG / AFR + others)

description: Oregon Housing and Community Services down payment assistance.
key_features: State-specific programs, income and purchase price limits, can combine with FHA/VA/conventional
best_for: First-time buyers in Oregon

description: Replace existing mortgage with better rate or shorter term.
key_features: Lower rate or shorter term, no cash out, can remove PMI at 80% LTV
best_for: Homeowners with rates above current market

description: Simplified refinance for existing FHA borrowers.
key_features: Minimal documentation, often no appraisal needed, reduced closing costs
best_for: Current FHA borrowers who want a lower rate

description: Simplified refinance for existing VA borrowers.
key_features: Minimal documentation, no appraisal in most cases, can include funding fee in loan
best_for: Current VA borrowers who want a lower rate

description: Non-institutional lending for unique or time-sensitive situations.
key_features: Flexible terms, faster closing, higher rates, short-term solutions
best_for: Borrowers with unique situations that don't fit standard programs
